nodes.title: Scene breakdown (close-up stable)
widgets_values:
scene: close-up talking-head UGC, head-and-shoulders framing, centered face, soft natural daylight
character: same person as reference image, consistent identity, stable facial structure, natural skin texture
action: speaking directly to camera with small mouth movement, subtle jaw motion, minimal head movement, natural blinking
camera: static or very slight handheld movement, eye-level, no fast motion, no sudden zoom or angle change
tone: warm, conversational, believable
quality: accurate lip sync, high facial consistency, no facial distortion, no eye deformation

nodes.title: Image + audio → video
widgets_values:
**Image + audio file + scene prompt -> video (LTX 2.3)**

## Recommended for smoother face (especially Indonesian audio)

1. **Use close-up framing** in prompt (head-and-shoulders, centered face).
2. **Keep motion minimal** (static camera, subtle head movement).
3. **Clean audio first** (trim silence, reduce noise/reverb, avoid clipping, normalize level).
4. **Keep audio concise** when possible (shorter clips are usually more stable).
5. **Match spoken content and scene** so lip sync pressure stays realistic.

No Gemini or ElevenLabs dependency in this graph.

widgets_values:

## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors
│   └── 📂 loras/
│       ├── gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated_lora_rank64_bf16.safetensors
│       ├── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors
│       └── ltx-2.3-id-lora-talkvid-3k.safetensors
```

## Report Issue

Note: Please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud updates follow stable releases, so some nightly-supported models may not be available yet.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)
pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly
